name: BB:FalsePositive: SSH Server False Positive Events
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive QIDs that occur to or from SSH servers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: SSH Servers building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: SSH Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SSH Servers, BB:HostReference: SSH Servers
when the event QID is one of the following (6500120) Custom User 9 - Event CRE
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: SSH Server False Positive Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SSH Servers, BB:HostReference: SSH Servers
AND when the event QID is one of the following (6500120) Custom User 9 - Event CRE
